steps.title: Read the added phrase
steps.content: The phrase a soft kind of rock appears immediately after steady like a rock and is set off by dashes. That placement shows it modifies or refines the earlier description.

steps.title: State the function
steps.content: The phrase qualifies Mr. Verloc's steadiness by making the rock comparison less rigid. B invents internal struggle, C makes it about surroundings, and D invents a private opinion. The answer is A.
